delivery_channel_risk.description: Customer established relationship in-person at a branch.
Account opened online, via mobile app, or mail.
delivery_channel_risk.controls_required: Digital liveness check, biometric verification, or e-KYC

delivery_channel_risk.description: Relationship established via an agent, broker, or intermediary.
delivery_channel_risk.controls_required: Enhanced Due Diligence (EDD) on both customer and intermediary
